questions.context_sentence: apply for a visa
questions.cn: 申请签证
questions.hint: 日常搭配：apply for 后面常跟具体要申请的目标（如签证、工作）。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: If you want to travel abroad, you need to ____ a visa first. (提示: 申请)

questions.meaning: vt. 租用；出租 vi. 租用；租金为 n. 租金
questions.context_sentence: rent a car
questions.cn: 租一辆车
questions.hint: 联想记忆：在租来的（rent）草地上搭帐篷（tent）。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: We don't have a vehicle of our own, so we are going to ____ a car for our road trip.

questions.meaning: vi. & vt. 收拾（行李） vt. 包装 n. （商品的）纸包；纸袋；大包
questions.context_sentence: pack some clothes
questions.cn: 收拾一些衣服
questions.hint: 联想记忆：把行李打包（pack）放进大麻袋（sack）里。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Please don't forget to ____ some warm clothes because it gets very cold on the mountain.

questions.context_sentence: which still has not been completely unearthed.
questions.cn: 它至今还没有被完全发掘出来。
questions.hint: 前缀记忆：un-（除去、移出）+ earth（土地）→ 从土里挪出来即挖掘。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Archaeologists are trying to ____ the ancient ruins buried deep underground. (提示: 挖掘；发掘)

questions.context_sentence: There are two especially interesting things to admire about the Inca civilisation.
questions.cn: 关于印加文明，有两个特别值得赞赏的有趣之处。
questions.hint: 谐音记忆：“额的妈呀”，太让人钦佩了。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Many tourists gather here to ____ the amazing architecture of the ancient city.

questions.meaning: vt. 联络；联系 n. 联系；接触
questions.context_sentence: For more brochures about other package tours around Peru, contact us at tourinfo@travelperu.org.
questions.cn: 如需更多关于秘鲁其他包价旅游的手册，请通过 tourinfo@travelperu.org 联系我们。
questions.hint: 前缀记忆：con-（共同）+ tact（触碰）→ 保持互相联系。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: If you have any further questions about the flight, you can ____ our customer service right away.

questions.context_sentence: check in / check out
questions.cn: 办理入住 / 办理退房
questions.hint: 方向记忆：核对完（check）信息走进（in）宾馆。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: As soon as we arrived at the hotel, we went to the front desk to ____. (提示: 登记入住)

questions.context_sentence: check in / check out
questions.cn: 办理入住 / 办理退房
questions.hint: 方向记忆：核对完（check）账单走出（out）宾馆。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: We must ____ of the hotel before 12:00 noon, or we will have to pay for an extra night. (提示: 结账离开)

questions.meaning: n. 议论；评论 vi. & vt. 发表意见；评论
questions.context_sentence: Revise your draft according to your partner's comments.
questions.cn: 根据你同伴的评论修改你的草稿。
questions.hint: 网络常用：在网络上发表“评论”常用 comment 这个词。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The teacher asked us to ____ on the reading passage after finishing it.

questions.meaning: 火急火燎；迫不及待想做某事
questions.context_sentence: I've heard that it is an amazing sight, and I can't wait to go.
questions.cn: 我听说那是一个令人惊奇的景象，我迫不及待地想去。
questions.hint: 【教材补充词汇】直译记忆：不能（can't）继续等待（wait）去做某事了。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The summer holiday is coming, and I ____ pack my bags and travel to New Zealand!

questions.context_sentence: Neuschwanstein Castle, Germany
questions.cn: 德国新天鹅堡
questions.hint: 联想记忆：城堡（castle）里有一头牛（cattle）。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的英文单词：'n. 城堡；堡垒'

questions.meaning: vi. & vt. 申请；请求 vt. 应用；涂（油漆、乳剂）
questions.context_sentence: apply for a visa
questions.cn: 申请签证
questions.hint: 字根记忆：ap（去）+ ply（折叠）→ 弯腰递交申请。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的英文单词：'vi. & vt. 申请；请求 vt. 应用；涂（油漆、乳剂）'

questions.context_sentence: apply for a visa
questions.cn: 申请签证
questions.hint: 谐音记忆：“维萨”，有了签证才能去维也纳看萨克斯表演。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的英文单词：'n. 签证'

questions.meaning: adj. 令人惊奇的；令人惊喜的
questions.context_sentence: Jiuzhaigou, China Why famous: amazing waterfalls, colourful lakes, beautiful mountains
questions.cn: 中国九寨沟 著名原因：令人惊奇的瀑布，色彩斑斓的湖泊，美丽的群山
questions.hint: 联想记忆：迷宫（maze）大得令人惊奇（amazing）。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的英文单词：'adj. 令人惊奇的；令人惊喜的'

questions.context_sentence: Actually, I've just finished the travel arrangements!
questions.cn: 事实上，我刚刚完成了旅行安排！
questions.hint: 组合记忆：arrange（安排）+ -ment（名词后缀）→ 安排，筹备。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的英文单词：'n. 安排；筹备'

questions.context_sentence: Jiuzhaigou is an extremely beautiful place.
questions.cn: 九寨沟是一个极其美丽的地方。
questions.hint: 组合记忆：extreme（极端的）+ -ly（副词后缀）→ 极其。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的英文单词：'adv. 极其；非常'

questions.context_sentence: What other sources of information can you find about Peru?
questions.cn: 关于秘鲁，你还能找到什么其他的信息来源？
questions.hint: 联想记忆：来源（source）是资源（resource）的基石。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的英文单词：'n. 来源；出处'

questions.meaning: adj. 狭窄的 vi. & vt. （使）变窄
questions.context_sentence: PERU is a country on the Pacific coast of South America with three main areas: narrow, dry, flat land running along the coast...
questions.cn: 秘鲁是南美洲太平洋沿岸的一个国家，有三个主要区域：沿海狭窄、干燥、平坦的土地...
questions.hint: 联想记忆：狭窄的（narrow）街道上掉落了一支箭（arrow）。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的英文单词：'adj. 狭窄的 vi. & vt. （使）变窄'

questions.meaning: adj. 强有力的；有权势的；有影响力的
questions.context_sentence: In the 1400s and 1500s, Peru was the centre of the powerful ancient Inca Empire.
questions.cn: 在14、15世纪，秘鲁是强大的古代印加帝国的中心。
questions.hint: 组合记忆：power（力量）+ -ful（充满...的）→ 强有力的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的英文单词：'adj. 强有力的；有权势的；有影响力的'

questions.context_sentence: In the 1400s and 1500s, Peru was the centre of the powerful ancient Inca Empire.
questions.cn: 在14、15世纪，秘鲁是强大的古代印加帝国的中心。
questions.hint: 谐音记忆：“音牌儿”，这个帝国用特制的音乐牌来传递命令。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的英文单词：'n. 帝国'

questions.context_sentence: The Inca emperor lived in the now-famous site Machu Picchu.
questions.cn: 印加皇帝居住在如今闻名遐迩的马丘比丘遗址。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：管理帝国（empire）的人是皇帝（emperor）。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的中文意思：'emperor'

questions.context_sentence: The Inca emperor lived in the now-famous site Machu Picchu.
questions.cn: 印加皇帝居住在如今闻名遐迩的马丘比丘遗址。
questions.hint: 形近字：在这个位置（site）看风景（sight）。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的中文意思：'site'

questions.meaning: adj. 官方的；正式的；公务的 n. 官员；要员
questions.context_sentence: It is for this reason that Spanish is the main official language of Peru.
questions.cn: 正是因为这个原因，西班牙语是秘鲁的主要官方语言。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：办公室（office）里坐的是官方人员（official）。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的中文意思：'official'

questions.context_sentence: Recognise text type
questions.cn: 识别文本类型
questions.hint: 联想记忆：rec（反复）+ ogn（知道）+ ise → 反复核对终于认出来了。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的中文意思：'recognise'

questions.context_sentence: From there, you'll spend one day travelling by boat to your accommodation in the middle of the forest.
questions.cn: 从那里，你将花一天时间乘船前往森林中央的住处。
questions.hint: 趣味记忆：ac+com（共同）+mo+da（大）+tion → 大家都住在一个大大的住所里。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的中文意思：'accommodation'

questions.meaning: adj. 唯一的；独特的；特有的
questions.context_sentence: You can then spend three days exploring the rainforest with a local guide and enjoying the plants and animals unique to the rainforest.
questions.cn: 然后你可以花三天时间和当地导游一起探索雨林，享受雨林特有的动植物。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：uni（单一）→ 独一无二的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的中文意思：'unique'

questions.context_sentence: After reaching your destination, you will have a day to explore...
questions.cn: 到达目的地后，你将有一天的时间去探索...
questions.hint: 字根记忆：destin（命运注定）+ ation（名词后缀）→ 命中注定要抵达的终点。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的中文意思：'destination'

questions.context_sentence: Second, the Incas built wonderful cities full of amazing architecture— but there were no markets in these cities.
questions.cn: 其次，印加人建造了充满神奇建筑的奇妙城市——但在这些城市里没有市场。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：architect（建筑师）的成果就是architecture（建筑设计）。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的中文意思：'architecture'

questions.context_sentence: For more brochures about other package tours around Peru, contact us at tourinfo@travelperu.org.
questions.cn: 如需更多关于秘鲁其他包价旅游的手册，请通过 tourinfo@travelperu.org 联系我们。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：Bro（兄弟）给你一本宣传手册（brochure）看一看。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的中文意思：'brochure'

questions.context_sentence: There are two especially interesting things to admire about the Inca civilisation.
questions.cn: 关于印加文明，有两个特别值得赞赏的有趣之处。
questions.hint: 词根记忆：civil（公民的、文明的）+ isation（名词后缀）→ 文明。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的中文意思：'civilisation'

questions.context_sentence: The roads were for Inca soldiers and their...
questions.cn: 这些道路是供印加士兵和他们的...
questions.hint: 联想记忆：士兵（soldier）的肩膀（shoulder）上扛着枪。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的中文意思：'soldier'

questions.meaning: n. 交通运输系统 vt. 运输；运送
questions.context_sentence: Transport [Table Header]
questions.cn: 交通运输（表格表头）
questions.hint: 字根记忆：trans（转移）+ port（港口、运送）→ 跨港口运送。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的中文意思：'transport'
options: 交通运输系统 / 运输

questions.context_sentence: Would you like to travel business class or economy?
questions.cn: 你想坐商务舱还是经济舱？
questions.hint: 谐音记忆：“依靠农民”，国家的经济主要还是依靠农民伯伯。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的中文意思：'economy'

questions.meaning: n. 细节；详情；细微之处
questions.context_sentence: Details: travel date(s)...
questions.cn: 详情：旅行日期...
questions.hint: 联想记忆：把尾巴（tail）底下的（de）每个跳蚤看得一清二楚 → 注意细节。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的中文意思：'detail'

questions.context_sentence: It's amazing that there are more than 8,000 statues...
questions.cn: 令人惊奇的是，有超过8000座雕像...
questions.hint: 字根记忆：stat（站立）+ ue → 站立在那里的艺术品就是雕像。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的中文意思：'statue'

questions.meaning: n. 旅行指南；导游手册
questions.context_sentence: buy a guidebook
questions.cn: 买一本旅行指南
questions.hint: 【教材补充词汇】组合词：guide（向导）+ book（书）→ 导游书、指南。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的英文单词：'n. 旅行指南；导游手册'

questions.context_sentence: amazing waterfalls, colourful lakes, beautiful mountains
questions.cn: 令人惊奇的瀑布，色彩斑斓的湖泊，美丽的群山
questions.hint: 【教材补充词汇】组合词：water（水）+ fall（落下）→ 水落下来就是瀑布。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的英文单词：'n. 瀑布'

questions.context_sentence: connecting Cusco to Lake Titicaca.
questions.cn: 连接库斯科和的的喀喀湖。
questions.hint: 【教材补充词汇】组合词：high（高的、高级的）+ way（路）→ 高速公路、主干道。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的英文单词：'n. 公路；主干道'

questions.context_sentence: will start sightseeing right away
questions.cn: 将立刻开始观光游览
questions.hint: 【教材补充词汇】组合词：sight（风景）+ see（看）+ ing → 去看风景。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的英文单词：'n. 观光；游览'

questions.context_sentence: get a passport
questions.cn: 取得护照
questions.hint: 【教材补充词汇】组合词：pass（通过）+ port（港口、关卡）→ 允许过关的证件。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 选择正确的英文单词：'n. 护照'
